writer.name: 罗布·斯普拉克林 Rob Sprackling

director.name: 拉斯姆斯·A·西韦特森 Rasmus A. Sivertsen

this_title: Rally – From Paris to the Pyramids
introduction: The adventure film for family audiences follows Reodor Felgen, a brilliant but eccentric inventor, and his two unlikely friends—Solan, a daring magpie, and Ludvig, a timid hedgehog—as they attempt to redeem themselves by competing in the Paris-to-the-Pyramids rally. Equipped with their racecar, Il Tempo Gigante, the trio embark on a high-stakes journey through bustling Paris, across the perilous Italian Alps, and into the scorching Egyptian desert.The film is inspired by the work of Norwegian author Kjell Aukrust, and the iconic Il Tempo Gigante, one of the most beloved cars in Norway’s automotive culture.
chinese_title: Rally – From Paris to the Pyramids
